title: Capture and manage scientific images
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Capture and manage scientific images demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Establish requirements for image capture

pcs.text: Define requirements and purpose of the work and create a brief

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define requirements and purpose of the work and create a brief.
